description_long: This is a traditional Mexican sombrero with a tall, conical crown and a very wide, upturned brim. The hat is primarily a light tan color, with a decorative band around the base of the crown featuring red and green stripes. The brim is adorned with a vibrant geometric pattern in red, green, and yellow, giving it a festive and eye-catching appearance. The surface appears to be made of woven straw or a similar lightweight material, typical of authentic sombreros. The hat is designed to provide ample shade and is both functional and decorative. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A festive Mexican sombrero with a tall, conical crown and a wide, patterned brim in tan, red, green, and yellow.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full conical crown, decorative band, and the colorful geometric brim pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall crown and the curvature of the wide brim with visible pattern details.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the crown and the continuous decorative brim pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the crown and brim pattern visible, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_brim_style: very wide, upturned, and flat with decorative pattern
